landing.typewriter1: Analyzing 2.5M+ threats per day across global networks...
landing.typewriter3: Mapping adversary TTPs to MITRE ATT&CK framework...
landing.heroDesc: Government-grade AI-powered security operations center. Real-time threat detection, automated incident response, and comprehensive cyber defense for organizations that cannot afford to be breached.
landing.featuresDesc: Purpose-built security operations platform combining AI analysis with automated defense mechanisms
landing.featureAiDesc: Advanced machine learning models analyze security events in real-time, providing expert-level threat assessment and actionable recommendations.
landing.featureMonitorDesc: Live security event feeds via WebSocket connections, with instant alerting and customizable dashboards for complete situational awareness.
landing.featureDefenseDesc: Automated response playbooks execute countermeasures in milliseconds. IP blocking, asset isolation, file quarantine, and domain sinkholing.
landing.featureMitreDesc: Full tactical heatmap coverage across the MITRE ATT&CK framework. Track adversary techniques and measure detection capabilities.
landing.featureIncidentDesc: Structured incident management workflow from detection to resolution. Forensic timeline analysis and evidence preservation.
landing.featureIntelDesc: Aggregated threat intelligence feeds with IOC correlation. Automatic enrichment and threat scoring for proactive defense.
landing.ctaDesc: Deploy military-grade cybersecurity for your organization. Full SOC capabilities with AI-powered threat detection and automated response.
landing.footerDesc: Military-grade AI-powered cybersecurity platform providing comprehensive security operations center capabilities for governments and enterprises worldwide.

public.aboutMissionText: AegisAI was founded with a singular purpose: to provide military-grade cybersecurity capabilities to organizations that protect critical infrastructure, national security, and essential services. We believe that every organization deserves access to the same caliber of cyber defense used by the world's most secure institutions.
public.aboutValueProtectionDesc: Unwavering commitment to defending our clients' digital assets against the most sophisticated cyber threats.
public.aboutValueInnovationDesc: Continuous advancement of AI-powered defense mechanisms to stay ahead of evolving threat landscapes.
public.aboutValueExcellenceDesc: Delivering the highest standard of security operations with precision, reliability, and measurable outcomes.
public.aboutValueIntegrityDesc: Maintaining the highest ethical standards in data handling, threat disclosure, and client relationships.
public.aboutTeamDesc: Built by cybersecurity experts with decades of experience in military and intelligence operations. Our team combines deep technical expertise with operational security knowledge to deliver a platform that meets the demands of the most security-conscious organizations.
public.featuresSubtitle: Comprehensive security operations platform engineered for organizations that demand the highest level of cyber defense.
public.pricingSubtitle: Choose the level of protection that matches your operational requirements.
public.pricingStarterDesc: Essential security monitoring for small teams
public.pricingProDesc: Full SOC capabilities for growing security teams
public.pricingEnterpriseDesc: Unlimited security operations for large organizations
public.privacyIntro: AegisAI is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
public.privacyCollectText: We collect information you provide directly, such as account registration details, organization information, and security event data processed through our platform. We also collect usage data including log data, device information, and platform interaction metrics.
public.privacyUseText: Your information is used to provide and improve our security services, process and analyze security events, generate threat intelligence, send security alerts and notifications, and maintain platform security and integrity.
public.privacySecurityText: We implement military-grade encryption and security measures to protect your data. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Access is strictly controlled through role-based permissions and multi-factor authentication.
public.privacyRetentionText: Security event data is retained according to your subscription plan. You may request deletion of your data at any time, subject to legal and regulatory requirements.
public.privacyThirdPartyText: We may share anonymized threat intelligence data with security partners to improve collective defense capabilities. We do not sell personal information to third parties.
public.privacyRightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also request data portability or restrict processing of your information.
public.privacyContactText: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@aegisai.com.
public.termsIntro: By accessing or using the AegisAI platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
public.termsAcceptText: By creating an account or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms and our Privacy Policy.
public.termsServiceText: AegisAI provides a cloud-based security operations center platform including threat monitoring, incident response, and security analytics capabilities. Service availability and features vary by subscription plan.
public.termsAccountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. Each user must have a unique account.
public.termsUseText: You agree to use the platform only for lawful security monitoring purposes. You must not use the platform to conduct attacks, unauthorized scanning, or any activity that violates applicable laws.
public.termsIpText: All platform content, features, and functionality are owned by AegisAI. Your security event data remains your property. You grant us a limited license to process this data for service delivery.
public.termsLiabilityText: AegisAI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the amount paid for the service in the preceding 12 months.
public.termsTerminationText: Either party may terminate the agreement with 30 days written notice. We may suspend service immediately for violations of these terms or non-payment.
public.termsLawText: These terms are governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration.
public.termsContactText: For questions about these terms, contact legal@aegisai.com.
public.refundIntro: We stand behind our platform and want you to be fully satisfied with your subscription.
public.refundEligibilityText: You may request a full refund within 14 days of your initial subscription purchase. Refunds are available for annual plans on a pro-rated basis within 30 days.
public.refundProcessText: To request a refund, contact our billing team at billing@aegisai.com with your account details and reason for the request. We will process eligible refunds within 5-10 business days.
public.refundTimelineText: Approved refunds are processed within 5-10 business days. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
public.refundExceptionsText: Refunds are not available for accounts that have been terminated for violations of our Terms of Service, or for partial months of service on monthly plans.
